channel.title: Xiaomi 12 Lite MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater
channel.description: Your best website to track MIUI ROM releases!

image.title: Xiaomi 12 Lite MIUI Updates Tracker by XiaomiFirmwareUpdater

item.title: MIUI OS1.0.34.0.ULIMIXM Fastboot update for Xiaomi 12 Lite Global
item.description:
New Stable Fastboot update available!

Device: Xiaomi 12 Lite Global

Codename: taoyao

Version: OS1.0.34.0.ULIMIXM | 14.0

Size: 6.9 GB

MD5: e8602e568a7b82cabc34b7f3aeb43b72

Changelog:
[System]
Updated the security patch to May 2026. Increased system security.

Download: Here
